name: Tender Cooker Chuck Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium-sized skillet. Sear the meat on all sides.
2. Place the meat in the Tender Cooker.
3. Add water, garlic, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
4. Heat and scrape off any browned pieces of meat.
5. Pour the mixture over the meat.
6. Arrange onion and potato on top of the meat.
7. Cover with a single 7-inch circle of foil.
8. Set the regulator gauge and microwave on high for 30 minutes.
9. Allow the pressure indicator to drop, then remove the cover.
10. Remove the meat and vegetables.
11. Mix flour with water and stir into the juices in a separate container.
12. Microwave uncovered until thickened.
13. (If using a 400-500 watt oven, increase cooking time by 6 minutes.)
